diff:
diff --git a/src/history.py b/src/history.py
index 8ec6ea8..26422a3 100644
--- a/src/history.py
+++ b/src/history.py
@@ -3,9 +3,9 @@ def recent_unique(items, limit):
         return []
     seen = set()
     result = []
-    for item in items:
+    for item in reversed(items):
         if item in seen:
             continue
         seen.add(item)
         result.append(item)
-    return result[-limit:]
+    return result[::-1][-limit:]
